answer:
\boxed{Ronald L. Rivest}

The question refers to **Ronald L. Rivest**, who, along with Christos Papadimitriou, developed the **fastest known pancake-sorting algorithm** (with a worst-case bound of \(O(n \log n)\) flips) in 1981. This result remained optimal for decades before further refinements were made. Rivest is also well-known for his work in cryptography (e.g., RSA).
